description: PR3 scenario #6 — INSTRUCTOR_CLASH surfaces explicitly. Two sections taught by the same instructor would overlap at Sun 08:00 if both took it; the weaker-scored section gets a different slot, and its trace must record INSTRUCTOR_CLASH as the rejection reason for the Sun 08:00 alternative. Today this rejection is implicit inside scoring (the overlapping candidate gets a penalty and loses); PR3 makes it an explicit trace entry.
notes: INSTRUCTOR_CLASH is one of the two new PR3 rejection codes (the other is STUDENT_CONFLICT). Both document decisions that today are implicit in scoring penalties.
